title: Smoky Ethiopian Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy Ethiopian wrap filled with tender lamb and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with berbere spice mix and smoked paprika. Roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Shred the lamb with two forks and set aside.
Slice the lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and red onion into thin strips.
Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a layer of pickled mustard greens on each flatbread, followed by a spoonful of shredded lamb, some lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and red onion.
Top each wrap with a slice of smoked mozzarella cheese.
Optional: Add some charred peppers or onions on top for extra flavor and texture.
